Document:
# Ranged Weapons
Here you can find information about the ranged weapons available in the Wasteland.
Ranged weapons are divided into the following categories:
- [color=#a4885c]Small Guns[/color] — Pistols, revolvers, rifles, shotguns, and submachine guns that use conventional ammunition. - [color=#a4885c]Big Guns[/color] — Heavy weapons such as miniguns, grenade launchers, and missile launchers. - [color=#a4885c]Energy Weapons[/color] — Laser-based weapons that use energy cells and microfusion cells. - [color=#a4885c]Plasma Weapons[/color] — Weapons that fire superheated plasma.
## Ammunition
Every ranged weapon requires ammunition. Running out in combat is lethal. Always carry spare magazines or cartridges, and know what caliber your weapon uses before heading into the Wasteland.
Common calibers include [color=#a4885c]9mm[/color], [color=#a4885c]10mm[/color], [color=#a4885c].45[/color], [color=#a4885c]5.56[/color], [color=#a4885c].308[/color], and [color=#a4885c]7.62[/color]. Energy weapons use [color=#a4885c]energy cells[/color] or [color=#a4885c]microfusion cells[/color] instead of conventional rounds.
## Weapon Condition
Weapons degrade with use. A weapon in poor condition is less accurate and may malfunction. Keep your weapons maintained and repair them when possible.
